tasks.subject: Task 1: Backend — releases and PR repos routes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `GET /api/releases/ppg/{version}/packages`, `GET /api/releases/ppg/{version}/repos`, and `GET /api/pr/{pr}/{subproject}/{version}/repos` routes with passing tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/internal/api/handlers.go`
- Modify: `backend/internal/api/server.go`
- Modify: `backend/internal/api/handlers_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] `GET /api/releases/ppg/17/packages` returns HTTP 200 with a JSON array (empty on fresh DB)
- [x] `GET /api/releases/ppg/17/repos` returns HTTP 200 with `{"rpm":[],"deb":[]}` shape on fresh DB
- [x] `GET /api/pr/pr-92/ppg/17/repos` returns HTTP 200 with `{"rpm":[],"deb":[]}` shape on fresh DB
- [x] `go test ./backend/internal/api/...` passes

```json:metadata
{"files":["backend/internal/api/handlers.go","backend/internal/api/server.go","backend/internal/api/handlers_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"cd backend && go test ./internal/api/... -v -run 'TestReleases|TestPRRepos'","acceptanceCriteria":["GET /api/releases/ppg/17/packages returns HTTP 200 JSON array","GET /api/releases/ppg/17/repos returns HTTP 200 with rpm/deb shape","GET /api/pr/pr-92/ppg/17/repos returns HTTP 200 with rpm/deb shape","go test ./backend/internal/api/... passes"],"modelTier":"mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: useArtifacts — add contextPrefix parameter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `useArtifacts` accepts a `contextPrefix: MaybeRef<string>` 5th parameter so `packageRows` and `containerImages` filter against any OBS project prefix.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/composables/useArtifacts.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["frontend/src/composables/useArtifacts.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit","acceptanceCriteria":["useArtifacts accepts contextPrefix as 5th MaybeRef<string> parameter","packageRows uses exactProject = prefix + ':' + ver","containerImages uses startsWith(prefix + ':' + ver + ':')","vue-tsc passes"],"modelTier":"mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: ArtifactsVersionBar — context selector UI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `ArtifactsVersionBar` replaces the static OBS badge with a context-aware `<select>` dropdown (multiple contexts) or plain badge (single context).

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/components/ArtifactsVersionBar.vue`

```json:metadata
{"files":["frontend/src/components/ArtifactsVersionBar.vue"],"verifyCommand":"cd frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit","acceptanceCriteria":["obsRoot prop removed, contexts and selectedContext added","update:context emit declared","conditional badge vs select rendering","context-select CSS styled with font-mono and bg-muted"],"modelTier":"mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: ArtifactsPanel self-fetch + App.vue wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `ArtifactsPanel` manages its own context state and fetches packages independently. `App.vue` passes only `prGroups`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/components/ArtifactsPanel.vue`
- Modify: `frontend/src/App.vue`

```json:metadata
{"files":["frontend/src/components/ArtifactsPanel.vue","frontend/src/App.vue"],"verifyCommand":"cd frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit","acceptanceCriteria":["ArtifactsPanel props are prGroups only","artifactsContexts includes PPG Releases PR contexts","availableVersions derived from packages by prefix depth","fetchPackages called on mount and context change","fetchRepos URL selected by context apiBase","App.vue passes pr-groups removes old props","vue-tsc passes"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```
